description_long: This is a medium-sized, utilitarian boat with a long, narrow hull and a modest superstructure located near the center. The hull appears to be constructed primarily from metal, with visible signs of wear and utilitarian detailing, such as railings and equipment mounted on the deck. The boat features a small cabin or wheelhouse with windows, and various mechanical components and storage areas are visible along the deck. The bow is pointed and slightly raised, while the stern is squared off, suggesting a workboat or service vessel design. There are several visible hatches, railings, and possibly a small crane or winch, indicating the boat is equipped for practical tasks. The overall color palette is dominated by shades of gray and metallic tones, with some accents of blue and red equipment.
description: A medium-sized, metal workboat with a narrow hull, central cabin, and utilitarian deck equipment in gray and metallic tones.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed bow, central superstructure, and some deck equipment.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the full length of the hull, cabin, and various deck features including railings and equipment.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the squared stern, visible equipment, and the back of the cabin.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the hull profile, cabin, and additional deck details.
